sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)
1. any session or assembly of persons deliberating or adjudicating
2. the Sanhedrin, the great council at Jerusalem

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter of a presumed derivative of a compound of G4862 and the base of G1476; a joint session, that is, (specifically) the Jewish Sanhedrim; by analogy a subordinate tribunal: - council.
